slides.headline: Simplify Delimiting Date Management

outline.caption: Simplify delimiting date management for your VA School Certifying Officials. Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro. Get started today and streamline your GIBill® certification process. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Compliance Tracking' slide could benefit from a more detailed explanation of what 'real-time updates' means in the context of GIBill® requirements.
